name: @tank/python
description: Modern Python (3.10+) patterns for production applications. Covers type hints (TypeVar, Protocol, ParamSpec), dataclasses and attrs, match/case patterns, async/await (asyncio, TaskGroup, structured concurrency), project structure (src-layout, pyproject.toml, uv), testing with pytest (fixtures, parametrize, mocking), error handling patterns, Pydantic v2 for validation, and packaging. Synthesized from Python official docs, Fluent Python (Ramalho), Robust Python (Viafore), and community patterns. Triggers: python, type hint, dataclass, async, asyncio, pytest, pydantic, match case, protocol, packaging, pyproject.toml, uv, pip, virtual environment, decorator, context manager, generator, comprehension, f-string, walrus operator.
